creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Thank you for your contribution. Please also correct the e-mail address in the Makefile to correspond to your Bugzilla address. I've noticed some of your other ports list the BZ address so I'm guessing that's what you'd want to do.

We have no other way to confirm you're the maintainer and automate the approvals and feedbacks.
